MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RAY DURHAM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Sustained without leave to amend.
